hero.subtitle: Your Campus Survival Guide
hero.description: A student-created resource to help international students navigate Seattle and UW campus life. Find housing, discover great food, and make the most of your Husky experience.

carousel.title: Explore Our Beautiful Campus
carousel.subtitle: Discover what makes UW Seattle special

features.title: Everything You Need to Know
features.subtitle: Your comprehensive guides to thriving at UW Seattle

campusLife.title: Campus Life
campusLife.description: Essential locations, resources, and tips for navigating UW Seattle campus

housing.title: Housing Guide
housing.description: Find the perfect neighborhood and apartment near campus

food.title: Food & Dining
food.description: Discover the best restaurants and food spots around UW

transport.title: Getting Around

about.title: Made by Huskies, for Huskies
about.subtitle: We know how overwhelming it can be to start fresh in a new country. That's why we created this guide.
about.byStudentsDesc: Created by international students who've been through it all
about.communityDesc: Recommendations based on real experiences and feedback
about.updatedDesc: Fresh tips and information added regularly
about.contactPrompt: Have tips to share or suggestions for improvement?

footer.description: A student-created resource helping international students navigate UW Seattle and make the most of their Husky experience.
footer.madeBy: Made by UW students, for UW students 💜
footer.suggestions: Have suggestions or corrections? We'd love to hear from you!
footer.copyright: UW Survival Guide. All information provided as-is.
footer.notAffiliated: Not officially affiliated with the University of Washington.
footer.disclaimerText: This guide is created by students and is for informational purposes only. Information may be outdated or inaccurate. Always verify important details with official UW sources. We are not responsible for any decisions made based on this information.
